## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] I kept this PR scoped to one problem.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing, CLI, API, warning/error, or release changes.
- [ ] I did not commit private documents, credentials, generated junk, or large unrelated binaries.
- [ ] Fixture changes include provenance and redistribution notes.
- [ ] Breaking changes, public API changes, or release/distribution changes are called out.
